title: Ordivon Path Map Rules
description: Deterministic classification rules for auto-maintained path map. Files are classified into governed routes or flagged as unclassified. Unclassified protected paths → BLOCKED. Unclassified non-protected paths → exclusion or debt required. AI may propose classifications but may not create authoritative routes.

routes.label: Governance Core
routes.description: Core governance documents, checkers, CI workflows, and control scripts

routes.label: AI Boundaries
routes.description: AI onboarding documents, phase boundaries, runtime records

routes.label: Product Documentation
routes.description: Product specs, roadmaps, stage summits, architecture docs

routes.label: Generated Views
routes.description: Auto-generated files derived from source ledgers. Must not be source of truth. Manual edits → DRIFT DETECTED.

routes.label: Knowledge Assets
routes.description: Lessons, debts, CandidateRules, and their ledgers

routes.label: Source Code
routes.description: Python source modules implementing governance logic, not documentation

routes.label: Configuration & Schemas
routes.description: JSON schemas defining governance data structures

fallbacks.description: File in a governed directory with no route and no exclusion
fallbacks.required_remediation: Add registry entry + doc_type + owner + authority, OR add governed exclusion with reason/owner/review_date

fallbacks.description: File outside governed directories with no route
fallbacks.required_remediation: Must be added to governed-exclusions.json with reason/owner/review_date, OR recorded as A4 debt with review trigger

fallbacks.description: Generated file has been manually edited
fallbacks.required_remediation: Run update script to regenerate, OR reclassify file as source_of_truth

ai_classification_policy.description: AI may propose classifications for unclassified files. Proposals are advisory — not authoritative. They must be reviewed by a human before being added to a route or exclusion.
